query: What does the TCATBALF JCL process?

0500-TCATBALF-OPEN
results.preamble:
File: CBTRN02C.cbl
Program: CBTRN02C - BATCH COBOL Program - Post the records from daily transaction file.
Paragraph: 0500-TCATBALF-OPEN (lines 327-344)
References: COPY CVTRA06Y, COPY CVTRA05Y, COPY CVACT03Y, COPY CVACT01Y, COPY CVTRA01Y
Calls: PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS, PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM
results.summary: paragraph 0500-TCATBALF-OPEN in CBTRN02C.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVTRA06Y, CVTRA05Y, CVACT03Y, CVACT01Y.... invokes: PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS, PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM. comment hint: ---------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
0500-TCATBALF-OPEN.                                                      
           MOVE 8 TO APPL-RESULT.                                               
           OPEN I-O  TCATBAL-FILE                                               
           IF  TCATBALF-STATUS = '00'                                           
               MOVE 0 TO APPL-RESULT                                            
           ELSE                                                                 
               MOVE 12 TO APPL-RESULT                                           
           END-IF                                                               
           IF  APPL-AOK                                                         
               CONTINUE                                                         
           ELSE                                                                 
               DISPLAY 'ERROR OPENING TRANSACTION BALANCE FILE'                 
               MOVE TCATBALF-STATUS TO IO-STATUS                                
               PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS                                   
               PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM                                       
           END-IF                                                               
           EXIT.                                                                
      *---------------------------------------------------------------*

results.name: 2700-A-CREATE-TCATBAL-REC
results.preamble:
File: CBTRN02C.cbl
Program: CBTRN02C - BATCH COBOL Program - Post the records from daily transaction file.
Paragraph: 2700-A-CREATE-TCATBAL-REC (lines 503-525)
References: COPY CVTRA06Y, COPY CVTRA05Y, COPY CVACT03Y, COPY CVACT01Y, COPY CVTRA01Y
Calls: PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS, PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM
results.summary: paragraph 2700-A-CREATE-TCATBAL-REC in CBTRN02C.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVTRA06Y, CVTRA05Y, CVACT03Y, CVACT01Y.... invokes: PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS, PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM. comment hint: ---------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
2700-A-CREATE-TCATBAL-REC.                                               
           INITIALIZE TRAN-CAT-BAL-RECORD                                       
           MOVE XREF-ACCT-ID TO TRANCAT-ACCT-ID                                 
           MOVE DALYTRAN-TYPE-CD TO TRANCAT-TYPE-CD                             
           MOVE DALYTRAN-CAT-CD TO TRANCAT-CD                                   
           ADD DALYTRAN-AMT TO TRAN-CAT-BAL                                     
                                                                                
           WRITE FD-TRAN-CAT-BAL-RECORD FROM TRAN-CAT-BAL-RECORD                
                                                                                
           IF  TCATBALF-STATUS = '00'                                           
               MOVE 0 TO APPL-RESULT                                            
           ELSE                                                                 
               MOVE 12 TO APPL-RESULT                                           
           END-IF                                                               
           IF  APPL-AOK                                                         
               CONTINUE                                                         
           ELSE                                                                 
               DISPLAY 'ERROR WRITING TRANSACTION BALANCE FILE'                 
               MOVE TCATBALF-STATUS TO IO-STATUS                                
               PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS                                   
               PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM                                       
           END-IF.                                                              
      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
